  • About Alen
  • Who is Alen Lobeiras, Clients and conferences.

Ever since I was a child, I have been interested in the digital and technological world, having a keen interest in computers and their operation, illustration programs and web page design. A fact that met with my parents' disapproval as they would almost daily come across electronic devices that I had dismantled due to my insatiable curiosity to know how things work.

I also devoured comics of all kinds and genres, which I later tried to draw with a kit of Indian ink and a nib that came with my weekly collectible. I drew a lot, too much, with the intention of one day being able to create a comic in my own style. I was fascinated with creating characters, building their personalities and abilities; and similarly for the design of the environments where their plots would unfurl. This practice got me interested in illustration, manga, superheroes and techniques for drawing with G-pen and Rotrings pens. I was attracted to typography and calligraphy when it came to inserting texts in the frames and I enjoyed creating eccentric onomatopoeias. This of course led to another upset for my parents, due to the large amount of paper I was getting through and textbooks for of doodles that they couldn't resell.

In the same way that my interest in the digital world and that of comics was born, I developed a passion for video-games, seeing in them all my enthusiasms combined. Portable consoles were my favourites, as were RPG games, graphic novels, arcades, open world and exploration games.

The discovery of graphic design was the final piece in the puzzle that had been years in the making. I acquired knowledge of digital image processing and editorial layout. I immersed myself in the world of typography and the work of interesting creators, the design of interfaces and web code, 3D modelling and animation... I came to know a world which totally hooked me in.

Currently almost all my projects, plus personal ones, take inspiration from these varied hobbies and influences. I try, as far as possible, to design characters or elements that communicate a message or tell a story through digital, typographic and illustrative experiences.

P.D: I love robots 🤖

  • Independent creativy and developers
  • Special Offer

For both creatives and developers, finding fonts with character to use for personal projects has always been a challenge. At Alen Lobeiras, I make my fonts and creations accessible to independent dreamers, offering them at a reduced price for those who cultivate their own ideas.

Non-commercial licence and limitations:

  • The license is non-commercial, meaning reselling or direct profit from the use of the font is notpermitted.
  • Valid for presentations, client pitches, and personal, student, or experimental projects.
  • Desktop use is limited to one user or studio, and web use is restricted to non-commercial or private websites.

Overview

This End User Licence Agreement ("Agreement") is a contract between Alen Lobeiras (hereinafter referred to as "Alen Lobeiras") and you, the Licensee (the individual, entity, or organization agreeing to this Agreement), in relation to your access to or use of the Fonts (digital font file software representing the typeface) from Alen Lobeiras. By purchasing, downloading, installing, or otherwise handling the Fonts, you agree to the terms of this Agreement. In doing so, you confirm that you understand and will adhere to its conditions.

Licence Scope

The Fonts included under this Agreement are provided in full version and are available in OpenType Font format (.otf), Web Open Font Format (.woff, .woff2), and Variable Font technology (.ttf, .woff, .woff2).

By purchasing the End User Licence for designers, studios, and indie developers, you are obtaining a non-exclusive, non-transferable, perpetual, and worldwide licence to use the Fonts as specified in this Agreement. You do not receive any rights to the copyright or intellectual property of the font design or any other part of the Fonts. All such rights remain with the original designer.

If you are acting on behalf of an end user, it is your responsibility to ensure that they accept this Agreement as written.

Any rights not explicitly granted under this Agreement remain reserved by Alen Lobeiras.

Permitted Use

The Fonts may be used for self-initiated, personal projects, preview and evaluation purposes, pitches, competitions, and presentations within your organization or for your clients, solely to demonstrate the potential use of the Fonts. This also includes student work for educational purposes and portfolio use. Fonts can be used on private websites only for testing purposes, with no public access.

The End User Licence permits you to install the Fonts on an unlimited number of devices within your organization.

Prohibited Actions

You are prohibited from using the Fonts for any commercial activities. This includes, but is not limited to, any consumer-facing applications, projects related to your usual business activities, commissions, or sales involving the Fonts.

You must not modify, adapt, translate, reverse engineer, decompile, disassemble, edit, reformat, alter, or attempt to access the source code of the Fonts or the designs they embody. Additionally, you may not create derivative works based on the Fonts, nor engage third parties to do so for custom design or the creation of static documents or images.

This End User Licence does not permit you to share the Fonts or the licence with any third parties or subcontractors working on your behalf.

Duration and Termination

This Agreement will automatically terminate if you, or any party authorized by you to use the Fonts, fail to comply with its terms. Termination does not preclude Alen Lobeiras from seeking damages for any breach of this Agreement. Furthermore, Alen Lobeiras reserves the right to charge you the cost of a commercial licence based on the actual usage of the Fonts on a per-infringement basis.

Disclaimer

Alen Lobeiras makes no express or implied warranty that the Fonts are suitable for any particular purpose. Alen Lobeiras shall not be liable to you or any third party for any direct, indirect, incidental, or consequential damages arising from the use or inability to use the Fonts, even if you have been informed of the possibility of such damages.

You agree to indemnify and hold Alen Lobeiras harmless from any claims or damages resulting from your misuse of the Fonts or violation of this Agreement.

Legal Considerations

You acknowledge that the typeface design and Font software are protected under Spanish copyright and intellectual property laws, as well as the copyright and design laws of other countries and international treaties.

This Agreement supersedes all previous discussions or negotiations, whether verbal or written. No amendment, modification, or waiver is valid or enforceable unless documented in a written agreement signed by Alen Lobeiras.

If any part of this Agreement is found to be unenforceable, the remaining provisions will continue to be valid and enforceable as per the terms outlined. Alen Lobeiras' decision not to enforce a provision of this Agreement at any given time does not constitute a waiver of their right to do so later.

Additional Information

If you require use of the Fonts for commercial purposes, a commercial licence is available for purchase on our website.

For any inquiries, please contact us at:hola@alenlobeiras.com

For use on a desktop workstation

This typeface is suitable for both personal and commercial projects. You are allowed to utilize this font at a single residential or business location on up to five (5) computers. The fonts are available in OpenType format. For larger licenses or additional information, please contact me at hola@alenlobeiras.com

  • Redistributing this font without consent is prohibited.

Not Allowed:

  • This font is exclusively for website use and cannot be used in applications, games, or other digital platforms.

Other licenses:

  • Legal Notice
  • Personal information protection

How do we use the personal information you provide?

Alen Lobeiras is committed to protecting the confidentiality of the data provided by its users. This protection extends to everything related to the collection and use of information provided through the Internet. In this sense, Alen Lobeiras guarantees, in accordance with the provisions of Organic Law 15/1999, of 13 December, on the Protection of Personal Data (LOPD), that it will use the personal data of users confidentially and that the server where the data is stored and processed has the necessary security measures to prevent access by unauthorised third parties.

All the information you provide will be used exclusively to process orders and facilitate purchases in our shop, as well as to inform you of our news. Alen Lobeiras guarantees that the information provided will not be shared with third parties and/or companies.

You can modify and cancel the data you have provided by writing to hola@alenlobeiras.com

null
  • Cookies
  • Read more about cookies on this site

About Cookies

In order to ensure the optimal functionality of our site, I occasionally store small data files, commonly known as cookies, on your device. This practice is also utilized by many popular websites.

null

What are Cookies used for?

In essence, cookies are tiny text files that are stored by a website on your computer or mobile device whenever you visit the site. By doing so, the website can retain your preferred actions and settings, such as your login information, preferred language, font size, and other display preferences, for a certain amount of time. This ensures that you don't have to continually re-enter these details every time you visit the site or switch between different pages.

Switch to light or dark mode theme:

  • I use a cookie to store your preference for how the site is displayed. That way, when you return to the site, you won't have to change the theme again.

Stripe payments:

  • For a better payment experience, www.shop.alenlobeiras.com uses a third party tool called Stripe. It uses cookies to enable express checkout via Google Pay and Apple Pay and payments by credit or debit card. Read more about Stripe Payments

How many people are Now Online?:

  • The site has a Pusher System which counts how many people are connected live to the site. If you do not want to be counted, simply click on the eye icon in the bottom of the website.
null

To delete all cookies from this site

  • FAQS
  • Most frequently questions about my work and purchasing

Alen Lobeiras' purpose

Alen Lobeiras® is a digital designer specialized in typography and UI, with a great appreciation for graphic design, comics and new technologies for visual purposes. All products for sale at alenlobeiras.com are bound to the following lisence for personal or commercial use.

null

How to order

It's simple, if you find the "buy now" button on a project, click on it, fill in the billing information and make the payment through the Stripe platform. Once the payment is made, you will be redirected to a page where you can download the digital item.

Important! Keep the file safe, as you will not receive a copy attached to your email. If you lose it or want to acquire it again, just write to me at hola@alenlobeiras.com and I will send you the file again

null

Which payment methods are there?

Payments can be made by credit or debit card, Google Pay or Apple pay, through Stripe's payment gateway. Billing details for all these payment methods are required to process the order.

NFT products will be available for purchase through the Opensea platform , with an ETH wallet. Once an NFT work has been purchased the creator will receive 10% of each sale.

null

What languages do the fonts support?

All fonts contain Basic Latin (Unicode block) character set, however some fonts have more Latin characters.

Unknown Alphabet is an exception since it is a new alphabet and has no visual characteristics with basic Latin.

null

Terms, conditions and refounds

When you purchase from www.alenlobeiras.com you agree all terms and conditions described below:

  • Once the digital file has been purchased, it will not be refunded. However, should any technical issues arise that prevent the proper use of the fonts, we will address and resolve the issue as promptly as possible.
  • In case of a request for the improvement or extension of the typography, the case will be studied if the author considers it necessary
